chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-1674 of 2023 _______________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _______________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection 2.For hearing of CMA No.20729/2025 3.For hearing of main case 19.01.2026 Mr. Nabeel Kolachi, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, AAG. Azeem Ahmed, Assistant Accounts Officer, Accountant General Sindh. ------------------------- The petitioner, Muzammil Hussain, has invoked the constitutional jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, seeking directions to the respondents for the release of his withheld retirement benefits, including provident fund, gratuity, and group insurance, along with markup at the prevailing bank rate till the date of actual realization. He has further prayed for the payment of monthly pension along with arrears of pensionary benefits from the date of his retirement. Today, the Accounts Officer submitted a statement stating that the petitioner’s case shall be processed upon completion of all requisite codal formalities. Accordingly, the respondents are directed to complete the said exercise within a period of two weeks and thereafter release the petitioner’s pensionary benefits, subject to his entitlement, strictly in accordance with law. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms. A copy of this order be transmitted to the Accountant General, Sindh, for immediate compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
